f4-spraypaint.changelog:
## F4 Spray Paint — Changelog (10.03.2026)

### Bug Fixes

First Person Camera Lock
Players can no longer switch out of first person while selecting, painting, or erasing. Camera switching is now forced off every frame.

Affected loops:
- SelectionLoop
- PaintingControlDisableLoop
- EraserFindTarget
- EraserInputLoop

Spray Can Prop
Fixed the spray can not appearing in the player's hand while painting. Bone index and offsets were corrected.

Cloth/Sponge Prop
Fixed the cleaning cloth prop not appearing correctly while erasing.

---

### New Features

Config.Debug System
- Added Config.Debug in config.lua
- When enabled, debug messages will print to the console
- Added debug logs for:
  - Prop loading / attaching
  - Selection mode start
  - Paint mode start & save
  - Erase mode start & save
  - Cleanup triggers
  - Server save/update requests

Open Source Handler Files
Added open files (open.lua) so server owners can add their own logic without editing the core.

Client handlers:
- CanSpray()
- CanErase()
- OnSprayCompleted(paintingId, center)
- OnSprayRemoved(paintingId)

Server handlers:
- ServerCanSpray(source)
- ServerCanErase(source)
- OnServerSprayCompleted(source, paintingId, data)
- OnServerSprayRemoved(source, paintingId)

Developer Exports
Added exports so other resources can interact with the spray system.

Client exports:
- GetAllSprays()
- GetSprayById(id)
- GetSprayState()
- IsPlayerSpraying()
- IsPlayerErasing()
- GetSprayCount()
- GetNearbyPaintings(coords, radius)

Server exports:
- GetAllSprays()
- GetSprayById(id)
- GetSprayCount()
- GetSpraysByPlayer(identifier)
- DeleteSpray(id)
- GetNearbyPaintings(x, y, z, radius)

---

### Security

Webhook Moved to Server Config
The Discord webhook has been moved from shared config to server-config.lua.

ServerConfig.DiscordWebhook

This prevents the webhook URL from being exposed if the resource is dumped.

---

### File Changes

- config.lua — Added Config.Debug, removed webhook
- utils.lua — Enabled DebugPrint
- main.lua — Camera lock, prop fixes, CanSpray integration
- painting.lua — Camera lock, debug logs, OnSprayCompleted
- eraser.lua — Camera lock, CanErase, OnSprayRemoved
- open.lua — New client handlers + exports
- open.lua — New server handlers + exports
- server-config.lua — New secure webhook storage
- logs.lua — Updated webhook reference
- fxmanifest.lua — Added new files + escrow_ignore
